title: Introducing Fable 5.0: The NEW Top-Tier AI Model Category! #shorts
summary: Fable 5.0 is announced as a new top-tier AI model category designed for complex challenges. It involves strategic deployment of Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus models for optimized research and AI solutions.
writeup: This short announces Fable 5.0, presented as a new top-tier AI model category aimed at complex challenges. It describes strategic deployment across the Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus models to optimize research and AI solutions. The framing positions tiered model selection as the mechanism for matching workloads to capability.
